Release notes:
# OpenObserve v0.70.0 Release Notes
**Download Binaries**: https://openobserve.ai/downloads
**Release Date**: March 11, 2026
**Previous Version**: v0.60.4
---
## Highlights
This release introduces **LLM Observability** with DAG graph visualization, session views, and user-level analytics for LLM traces. The **Service Graph** receives a major overhaul with tree view custom tooltips, edge latency trend charts, and baseline-driven coloring. A new **Incident Event Timeline** with an Activity tab enables comprehensive incident tracking. **Dashboard Enhancements** include panel-level time ranges, stream/field variable support, and table chart pagination. The **Query Builder for Logs** brings a visual query construction experience, while **1-Click Data Onboarding** simplifies initial setup. The **O2 Assistant** gains navigation capabilities, tool search, and image support.
---
## New Features
### AI & LLM Observability
- **DAG Graph for LLM Traces** - Directed acyclic graph visualization for LLM trace workflows (OSS#10388) — @haohuaijin
- **LLM Session View Backend API** - Backend API for viewing LLM sessions with full context (OSS#10412) — @haohuaijin
- **LLM User View** - User-level analytics and view for LLM usage tracking (OSS#10418) — @haohuaijin
- **LLM Field in UDS for Traces** - Added LLM field to unified data schema for traces (OSS#10372) — @haohuaijin
### O2 Assistant
- **O2 Assistant Navigation** - Navigation capabilities for the O2 AI assistant (OSS#10564) — @uddhavdave
- **O2 Assistant Improvements (Iter 2)** - Enhanced title handling, tool call improvements, and SQL skills (OSS#10473) — @uddhavdave
### Dashboard
- **Table Chart Pagination** - Pagination support for dashboard table charts (OSS#10285) — @ktx-riya
- **Panel-Level Time Range** - Time range configuration available at individual panel level (OSS#10288) — @ktx-vaidehi
- **Stream and Field Support from Variables** - Dashboard variables can now drive stream and field selection (OSS#10454) — @ktx-vaidehi
- **iFrame Support for HTML Chart** - Embed external content via iFrame in HTML chart panels (OSS#10532) — @ktx-abhay
### Logs & Search
- **Query Builder for Logs Page** - Visual SQL query builder on the logs page for easier query construction (OSS#10305) — @ktx-abhay
### Traces
- **Order by Duration for Traces** - Support sorting traces by duration in the traces list (OSS#10676) — @hengfeiyang
- **Traces UI Improvements** - Enhanced traces list interface with improved readability (OSS#10848) — @omkarK06
### Alerts & Incidents
- **Enrich Alert Dimensions from Query Conditions** - Automatically extract and enrich incident dimensions from alert query conditions (OSS#10399) — @ByteBaker
- **Incident Event Timeline with Activity Tab** - New event timeline system with Activity tab for comprehensive incident tracking — @ByteBaker
### Service Graph
- **Edge Latency Trend & Interaction Overhaul** - Edge latency trend charts with redesigned interaction model — @ByteBaker
- **Tree View Improvements & Telemetry Correlation** - Enhanced tree view with telemetry correlation support — @ByteBaker
- **Custom Tooltips, Inside Labels, and Dynamic Node Sizing** - Rich tooltips, in-node labels, and responsive node sizing for tree view — @ByteBaker
- **Baseline Latency for Edge Coloring** - Previous-slot baseline latency comparison for edge color coding — @ByteBaker
### Data Onboarding
- **1-Click Data Onboarding** - Simplified data onboarding with one-click setup capabilities (OSS#10331) — @chaitanya-sistla
### Infrastructure
- **Vortex File Format Support** - Support for Vortex as an optional file format for improved compression (OSS#10491, ENT#1269) — @haohuaijin
- **File List Partitioning** - Added partitioning for file list tables to improve query performance (OSS#10521) — @hengfeiyang
-...
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the openobserve/openobserve release v0.70.0, the release note describes a major release introducing LLM Observability with DAG graph visualization, session views, and user-level analytics for LLM traces; a major Service Graph overhaul with tree view custom tooltips, edge latency trend charts, and baseline-driven coloring; a new Incident Event Timeline with Activity tab; Dashboard Enhancements including panel-level time ranges, stream/field variable support, and table chart pagination; a Query Builder for Logs; 1-Click Data Onboarding; and O2 Assistant navigation, tool search, and image support. New features include DAG Graph for LLM Traces, LLM Session View Backend API, LLM User View, LLM Field in UDS for Traces, O2 Assistant Navigation, O2 Assistant Improvements, Table Chart Pagination, Panel-Level Time Range, Stream and Field Support from Variables, iFrame Support for HTML Chart, Query Builder for Logs Page, Order by Duration for Traces, Traces UI Improvements, Enrich Alert Dimensions from Query Conditions, Incident Event Timeline with Activity Tab, Edge Latency Trend & Interaction Overhaul, Tree View Improvements & Telemetry Correlation, Custom Tooltips, Inside Labels, and Dynamic Node Sizing, Baseline Latency for Edge Coloring, 1-Click Data Onboarding, Vortex File Format Support, and File List Partitioning.

Release notes:
# OpenObserve v0.80.0 Release Notes
**Download Binaries**: https://openobserve.ai/downloads
**Release Date**: April 23, 2026
**Previous Version**: v0.70.3
---
## Highlights
v0.80.0 is a major feature release introducing **ML-based Anomaly Detection** using the Random Cut Forest algorithm, a comprehensive **Dashboard overhaul** with pivot tables, cross-linking, config panel redesign, and TanStack table migration, along with **RUM Sourcemap support** for production JavaScript debugging. The release also expands **RBAC coverage** to report folders, incidents, and logs patterns, upgrades the **MCP implementation** to the 2025-11-25 specification, and introduces **Work Group v2** for slot-based admission control.
---
## New Features
### Dashboard
- **Pivot Table Support** — Added pivot table visualization type to dashboards (OSS#10774) — @ktx-abhay
- **Cross-Linking** — Cross-linking support between dashboards and logs page for seamless navigation (OSS#10652) — @ktx-abhay
- **Config Panel Redesign** — Redesigned dashboard configuration panel for improved usability (OSS#10917) — @ktx-vaidehi
- **TanStack Table Migration** — Refactored table chart to use TanStack Table for better performance and features (OSS#11036) — @ktx-vaidehi
- **SQL Autocomplete** — Auto-complete suggestions for SQL queries in dashboards (OSS#11251) — @ktx-vaidehi
- **JSON Field Display** — Added configuration option to show fields as JSON in dashboard visualizations (OSS#11091) — @ktx-abhay
- **Mustache Variable Replacement** — Support for replacing variable values with mustache syntax in dashboards (OSS#11085) — @ktx-abhay
- **Patch Panel APIs** — Added APIs for patch panel operations (OSS#11025) — @uddhavdave
### Traces & RUM
- **Sourcemaps for RUM** — Added sourcemap support for Real User Monitoring to enable debugging of minified JavaScript errors in production (OSS#10259) — @YashodhanJoshi1
- **Traces Table Improvements** — Enhanced traces table with better sorting, filtering, and display options (OSS#10941) — @omkarK06
- **Service Graph Improvements** — Enhanced service graph with metrics tab in node details panel, improved visualization (OSS#11097) — @omkarK06
### Anomaly Detection
- **Anomaly Detection P2** — Continued enhancements to anomaly detection pipeline and UI (OSS#10940) — @Loaki07
### AI & MCP
- **Custom AI Tools** — Added support for custom AI tool definitions and execution (OSS#11270) — @hengfeiyang
- **MCP 2025-11-25 Spec Upgrade** — Upgraded MCP implementation to the 2025-11-25 specification with pinned tools and schema cleanup (OSS#11181) — @hengfeiyang
- **Summary for Tool Responses** — Added summary generation for AI tool responses (OSS#10955) — @uddhavdave
### Infrastructure
- **Work Group v2** — Slot-based admission control for work groups, replacing the previous concurrency model (OSS#10990) — @hengfeiyang
- **S3 Infrequent Access Storage Class** — Support for S3 Infrequent Access storage class for cost optimization (OSS#11144) — @haohuaijin
- **Field Values in FST Logs Page** — Configuration option for field values display in Full-Text Search logs page (OSS#10951) — @hengfeiyang
- **Webinar Banner** — Added in-app webinar banner for user engagement (OSS#11240) — @bjp232004
### RBAC & Security
- **Report Folders API** — API support for organizing reports into folders (OSS#11261) — @Subhra264
### Reports & Alerts
- **Report Preview in Email** — Option to include preview images in email reports (OSS#11133) — @Subhra264
### Service Discovery
- **Simplified Service Discovery** — Simplified correlation core by replacing FQN/confidence model with direct name + distinguish_by lookup (OSS#10946) — @ByteBaker
---
## Improvements
### Performance
- Dashboard performance improvements — batch streaming response while main thread is blocked (OSS#11020) —...
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the openobserve/openobserve release v0.80.0, the release note describes a major feature release introducing ML-based Anomaly Detection using the Random Cut Forest algorithm, a comprehensive Dashboard overhaul with pivot tables, cross-linking, config panel redesign, and TanStack table migration, along with RUM Sourcemap support for production JavaScript debugging. The release also expands RBAC coverage to report folders, incidents, and logs patterns, upgrades the MCP implementation to the 2025-11-25 specification, and introduces Work Group v2 for slot-based admission control. New features include Pivot Table Support, Cross-Linking, Config Panel Redesign, TanStack Table Migration, SQL Autocomplete, JSON Field Display, Mustache Variable Replacement, Patch Panel APIs, Sourcemaps for RUM, Traces Table Improvements, Service Graph Improvements, Anomaly Detection P2, Custom AI Tools, MCP 2025-11-25 Spec Upgrade, Summary for Tool Responses, Work Group v2, S3 Infrequent Access Storage Class, Field Values in FST Logs Page, Webinar Banner, Report Folders API, Report Preview in Email, and Simplified Service Discovery.

chunks.raw_text:
Repository: openobserve/openobserve
Release: Release v0.90.0
Tag: v0.90.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-05-19T18:15:25Z; created_at: 2026-05-19T14:27:14Z
Release notes:
# OpenObserve v0.90.0 Release Notes
**Download Binaries**: https://openobserve.ai/downloads
**Release Date**: May 19, 2026
**Previous Version**: v0.80.3
---
## Highlights
v0.90.0 introduces the **Service Catalog** for traces, giving operators a topology view of their microservices with side-panel drill-downs. The **Trace Details sidebar** gains dedicated DB and Error tabs for richer debugging context. On the dashboard front, the chart engine moves to TanStack Table with CSV export, SQL auto-complete, and mustache variable substitution. Enterprise users get **contract-based subscriptions**, **license v2 with usage reporting**, and **org-level storage configuration**.
---
## New Features
### Traces
- **Service Catalog** — New service topology view with side-panel drill-downs, operations table, and service-level metrics (OSS#11555) — @omkarK06
- **DB Tab in Trace Details** — Dedicated database view in the trace details sidebar for inspecting DB queries within spans (OSS#11675) — @omkarK06
- **Error Tab in Trace Details** — Dedicated error view in the trace details sidebar for quick error inspection (OSS#11655) — @omkarK06
- **Schematic group field mapping** — Support for mapping group fields when creating multi-stream queries (OSS#11741) — @omkarK06
### Dashboards
- **Dashboard reports as CSV** — Export dashboard data as downloadable CSV files (OSS#11282) — @ktx-vaidehi
- **SQL auto-complete suggestions** — Context-aware SQL suggestions in the dashboard query editor (OSS#11251) — @ktx-vaidehi
- **TanStack Table migration** — Dashboard table chart refactored to TanStack Table for improved rendering and features (OSS#11036) — @ktx-vaidehi
- **Mustache variable replacement** — Replace dashboard variable placeholders with mustache syntax (OSS#11085) — @ktx-abhay
- **JSON field display option** — Configuration option to render fields as JSON in dashboard tables (OSS#11104) — @ktx-abhay
- **Datasources integration** — New datasources framework for connecting external data sources (OSS#11564) — @bjp232004
### Logs, Metrics & Search
- **Log pattern statistics** — Enumerated value statistics on log pattern variables for deeper pattern analysis (OSS#1591, ENT#1591) — @haohuaijin
- **LLM input/output as default FTS fields** — `llm_input` and `llm_output` now included in default full-text search for LLM observability (OSS#11518) — @hengfeiyang
- **Tantivy footer cache** — New caching layer for Tantivy index metadata to speed up search operations (OSS#11895) — @haohuaijin
### Infrastructure
- **Org-level storage configuration** — Configure S3-compatible storage per organization (OSS#11614, ENT#1628) — @YashodhanJoshi1
- **Super cluster sync for anomaly detection** — Anomaly detection now supports super cluster sync for multi-node consistency (OSS#11587, ENT#1621) — @Loaki07
- **Reset file-list-jobs subcommand** — New CLI subcommand to reset compactor file-list jobs for a specific stream (OSS#11535) — @hengfeiyang
## Improvements
### Performance
- Store `row_group_size` in Tantivy puffin footer and shrink to 128K for faster indexed reads (OSS#11965, ENT#1731) — @hengfeiyang
- Reduce compactor memory usage during parquet file processing (OSS#11851, OSS#11641) — @haohuaijin
- Tantivy index performance improvements (OSS#11708) — @haohuaijin
- Repartition parquet files to fit target partition sizes for more efficient storage (OSS#11685) — @haohuaijin
- Batch streaming responses while the main thread is blocked for smoother UI (OSS#11020) — @ktx-abhay
### Refactoring
- Update file statistics cache configuration and metrics (OSS#11950) — @hengfeiyang
- Select old-data compaction hours by file size, push merge filter to SQL (OSS#11638) — @hengfeiyang
- Make `detect_llm_stream` accept a key-lookup closure for flexible field detection (OSS#11481) — @hengfeiyang...
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the openobserve/openobserve release v0.90.0, the release note describes a major release introducing the Service Catalog for traces with topology view and side-panel drill-downs, Trace Details sidebar with dedicated DB and Error tabs, dashboard enhancements including TanStack Table migration, CSV export, SQL auto-complete, and mustache variable substitution, and enterprise features like contract-based subscriptions, license v2 with usage reporting, and org-level storage configuration. New features include Service Catalog, DB Tab in Trace Details, Error Tab in Trace Details, Schematic group field mapping, Dashboard reports as CSV, SQL auto-complete suggestions, TanStack Table migration, Mustache variable replacement, JSON field display option, Datasources integration, Log pattern statistics, LLM input/output as default FTS fields, Tantivy footer cache, Org-level storage configuration, Super cluster sync for anomaly detection, and Reset file-list-jobs subcommand. Improvements include performance enhancements like storing row_group_size in Tantivy puffin footer and shrinking to 128K, reducing compactor memory usage, Tantivy index performance improvements, repartition parquet files, and batch streaming responses, and refactoring like updating file statistics cache configuration, selecting old-data compaction hours by file size, and making detect_llm_stream accept a key-lookup closure.
